item.title: Version 0.5.12
item.description:
• explicit WD context for all chat entry points + Chat built-in agent
  • correct CONFIG_DIR and whats-new path in odyssey-control MCP
  • add scheduling capabilities to Ulysses via odyssey-control MCP
  • add Ulysses sample prompts — list agents, create agent, open chat, what's new
  • correct team ID, activate app before TCC dialogs, default voice off
  • wire odyssey-control as stdio MCP subprocess so tools appear in Claude
  • add odyssey-control MCP — structured app control for Ulysses
  • remove extra indentation from project thread rows inside DisclosureGroup
  • replace Active/History buckets with flat thread list + auto-shown Archived section
  • use DisclosureGroup for project rows to align chevron with agents/groups
  • move project chevron outside card to align with agents/groups
  • add left-side fold/unfold chevron to project rows in sidebar
  • match project icon badge size to agent/group style in sidebar
  • inject ODYSSEY_INSTANCE env var into sidecar so each instance identifies correctly
  • show instance name in window title for non-default Odyssey instances
  • pass instanceName to SidecarManager.Config so Keychain keys are correct for non-default instances
  • lock auto-named instances and move _lockFd above name
  • lock-based auto-naming for parallel Odyssey instances
  • remove AVCaptureDevice.requestAccess — mic TCC fires via AVAudioEngine
  • remove proactive permission request from onAppear (was crashing)
  • add Ulysses — resident app companion and config manager
  • request voice permissions on chat open + Open Settings button
  • replace onLongPressGesture with NSView mouseDown/mouseUp for mic hold
  • mic button gesture not firing on macOS — remove Button wrapper
  • auto-generate release notes in release.sh — shown in Sparkle update dialog and GitHub releases
  • crash in requestPermissions — nonisolated continuations for Swift 6
  • sidebar shows only pinned/active agents and groups
  • resolve voice crash and hold-gesture not working on macOS
  • add Lean Startup group with CEO-led executive team
  • add master Voice Features toggle to settings and chat
  • cast speaking rate via NSNumber to handle Double/Float AppStorage mismatch
  • add voice settings section (voice picker, auto-speak, rate, speaker button)
  • add VoiceModeOverlay and wire auto-send in ChatView
  • fix TTS stop state staleness and use @Environment in SpeakerButtonRow
  • add TTS speaker button to agent message bubbles
  • animate WaveformBarsView using TimelineView phase sweep
  • add STT mic button and waveform to chat input
  • add voice services and isVoiceModeActive to AppState
  • guard TTS delegate against stale cancel callback
  • add TextToSpeechService for TTS via AVSpeechSynthesizer
  • add VoiceInputService for STT via SFSpeechRecognizer
  • add microphone/speech permissions and Speech framework

item.title: Version 0.5.11
item.description:
• Sidebar now shows only pinned and active agents/groups — cleaner, less noise
  • New built-in group: Lean Startup with CEO, PM, Designer, and Engineer agents

item.title: Version 0.5.10
item.description:
• Performance: Eliminated main-thread stalls from SwiftData, debounced conversation index, isolated streaming observation, and batched saves
  • Fixed MarkdownContent rendering empty during view recycling
  • Sidecar GenerationService with REST endpoints for agent/group/template generation
  • Fixed template action button icons

item.title: Version 0.5.9
item.description:
• Project Templates: Project-scoped prompt templates with one-click auto-send from sidebar
  • Agent Model Picker: Choose Sonnet, Opus, Haiku, or Ollama per agent
  • Config Management: Delete and duplicate agents, skills, and MCPs with confirmation
  • Pin groups to sidebar for quick access
  • Global project templates auto-seeded across all projects

item.title: Version 0.5.8
item.description:
• Nostr invite flow refactored — cleaner wire types, updated pairing views, iOS bridge
  • Fixed launch crash caused by CloudKit entitlement stripped during Developer ID signing

item.title: Version 0.5.7
item.description: • ⚠️ This release had a launch crash and was superseded by v0.5.8

item.title: Version 0.5.6
item.description:
• Inline browser in chat with Safari and panel expand options
  • iOS Nostr relay bridge with integration tests
  • Fixed inline browser toolbar button visibility
